options.name: --branch
options.description: Specify the branch name.

options.name: --build
options.description: Specify the build number.

options.name: --sha
options.description: Specify the commit sha.

options.name: --disable-network
options.description:
Toggle functionalities. (1) --disable-network. Disable
uploading the file network.

options.name: --dump
options.description: Don't upload and dump to stdin.

options.name: --env
options.description:
Specify enviornment variables to be included with this
build. (1) CODECOV_ENV=VAR1,VAR2. (2) -e VAR1 VAR2.

options.name: --feature
options.description:
Toggle functionalites.
Use -X s3 to disable the default uploader.

options.name: --file
options.description:
Target file(s) to upload.
(1) -f "path/to/file". Only upload this file.
(2) -f "path/to/file1" "path/to/file2". Only upload these

options.name: --flag
options.description:
Flag the upload to group coverage metrics. (1) --flag
unittests. This upload is only unittests. (2) --flag
integration. This upload is only integration tests. (3)
--flag ut,chrome. This upload is chrome - UI tests.

options.name: --name
options.description: Custom defined name of the upload. Visible in Codecov UI.

options.name: --no-color
options.description: Remove color from the output.

options.name: --pr
options.description: Specify the pull request number.

options.name: --root
options.description: Used when not in git/hg project to identify project root

options.name: --required
options.description: Exit with 1 if not successful. Default will Exit with 0.

options.name: --slug
options.description:
owner/repo slug used instead of the private repo token in
Enterprise. (option) Set environment variable
CODECOV_SLUG=:owner/:repo.

options.name: --tag
options.description: Specify the git tag.

options.name: --token
options.description:
Set the private repository token. (option) set the
enviornment variable CODECOV_TOKEN=:uuid. (1) -t uuid.

options.name: --url
options.description:
Set the target url for Enterprise customers. (option) Set
environment variable
CODECOV_URL=https://my-hosted-codecov.com.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Verbose mode.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
